message:
🌱 Add weaviate: [UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or mission (#1209)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "weaviate-2656-ux-weaviate-should-be-runnable-without-any-env-vars-or-cli-args-se",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "weaviate: [UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or cli args set",
+    "description": "[UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or cli args set. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current weaviate deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your weaviate version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nhelm list -n weaviate 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working weaviate installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review weaviate configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant weaviate configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nkubectl get configmap -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=weaviate\n```\nIt should then pick reasonable defaults for everything."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or…",
+        "description": "### What's being changed:\n\n### Review checklist\n```yaml\nexport PERSISTENCE_DATA_PATH=\"./data\"\nexport AUTHENTICATION_ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_ENABLED=\"true\"\n./weaviate --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --scheme http\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n weaviate -l app.kubernetes.io/name=weaviate\nkubectl get events -n weaviate --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[UX] Weaviate should be runnable without any env vars or…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/pull/3473",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "export PERSISTENCE_DATA_PATH=\"./data\"\nexport AUTHENTICATION_ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_ENABLED=\"true\"\n./weaviate --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080 --scheme http"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "weaviate",
+      "community",
+      "vector-db",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "weaviate"
+    ],

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate/issues/2656",

+    },

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
